description: UniCourt provides legal and litigation data products, including access to state and federal court records, PACER-connected court data, and legal analytics on attorneys, law firms, judges, parties, and cases. Its products are aimed at law firms, insurers, and other organizations working with court and docket data.
summary: UniCourt exposes a documented HTTP Enterprise API suite at `https://enterpriseapi.unicourt.com/`, covering court data, analytics, PACER, tracking, documents, and webhooks, authenticated with a bearer token provisioned for Enterprise/API customers.
